description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front includes a large garage door, a main entrance with a glass door, and a tiled driveway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, a shaded pergola, and a barbecue area, all set on a light stone terrace. Large sliding glass doors and balconies provide access to the outdoor spaces from the upper and lower floors, while the windows are arranged asymmetrically for a contemporary look. The house is surrounded by a paved area and some greenery, with outdoor furniture and amenities enhancing its livability. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The design is minimalist and emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, tiled driveway, and a section of greenery along the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool, patio, shaded pergola, outdoor seating, barbecue area, and large sliding glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_2: Side view with a plain white wall, a single door, a window, and visible patio furniture and pool area extending from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with black exterior walls, two windows, and a glimpse of the driveway and outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large sliding glass doors and balcony windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, tiled steps, and a minimalist overhang, adjacent to a large garage door.
